llm_dimensions.name: frugality
llm_dimensions.description: Did the agent answer with the minimum necessary content?
llm_dimensions.high: answered in one short line, no preamble, no caveats
llm_dimensions.medium: answered correctly but with one or two extra sentences
llm_dimensions.low: verbose, repeated the question, or hedged unnecessarily
llm_dimensions.evidence_hints: reply length, presence of filler ('Sure!', 'Of course,'), repeated context
